**Aarambh Institute**

Coaching Classes | Class 4 to 12

  **WEBSITE CONTENT REQUIREMENT FORM**    
  Fill this form to replace demo data with real institute information  

**How to use this document**

1. Fill all fields marked with **\* (Red asterisk)**  
2. Optional fields can be left blank â€” website will skip them automatically  
3. For repeating items (faculty, courses, testimonials), fill as many rows as needed  
4. Send filled document \+ any photos/logo to the developer

  **SECTION 1 â€” Basic Institute Information**  

| Institute Name \* | Aarambh Institute |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Tagline / Slogan \*** | Step Toward Success |
| **Established Year \*** | 2015 |
| **City / Location \*** |  Indore, Madhya Pradesh |
| **Full Address \*** | 8 Shantinath Puri, Hawa Bangla,Near, Sai Mandir |
| **Phone Number (primary) \*** | 88397-14081, 79097-14081 |
| **WhatsApp Number \*** | 88397-14081 , 79097-14081 |

| **Website Domain (if any) \*** |  aarambhinstitute.com  |

| **Classes Taught \*** | 4th to 12th, BSC, BCOM , M.COM , BBA , MBA |

  **SECTION 2 â€” Hero / Banner Section (Top of Page)**  

*This is the very first thing students see when they open your website.*

| Main Heading (Big Title) \* | e.g. 'Excel in Boards with Expert Guidance' |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Sub-heading \*** | e.g. '10 Years of Trusted Coaching for Class 9-12' |
| **Hero Button 1 Text \*** | e.g. 'Enroll Now' or 'Join Free Demo' |
| **Hero Button 1 Link \*** | Phone number / WhatsApp / Form link |
| **Hero Button 2 Text** *(optional)* | e.g. 'View Courses' (optional) |
| **3-4 Key Highlights \*** *Short stats shown below hero â€” e.g. 10+ Years Experience | 500+ Students | 95% Board Results | Expert Faculty* | \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_*15 Years Experience | 500+ Students | 95% Board Results | Expert Faculty*\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ |

  **SECTION 3 â€” About the Institute**  

| About Paragraph (2-3 lines) \* *Write a short intro about your institute, its mission, and what makes it special.* | At Aarambh Institute we believe that the right guidance at the right time can transform a student academic journey our experience faculty well research curriculum and student centre approach make learning both effective and engaging. \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ |

  **SECTION 6 â€” Why Choose Aarambh? (USP Section)**  

*These are the key points shown as feature cards. Provide 4 to 6 points.*

| \# | Feature / USP Title | Description (1-2 lines) |
| :---: | :---- | :---- |
| 1 |  Expert Faculty |  Highly qualified and experience teachers |
| 2 | Personalised Attention | Small batch sizes to ensure individual guidance and better student teacher interation |
| 3 | Result Oriented Approach | Record of excellent results in board exams |
| 4 | Comprehensive study material and regular  test and feedback | Notes,practice sets and return modules designed for all levels .Weekly test and timely feedback. |
| 5 | Supportive learning environment | Encouraging atmosphere that builds confidence and motives students to excel  |
| 6 | Fee Structure | Quality education at student friendly price. |

  **SECTION 8 â€” Student / Parent Testimonials**  

*Minimum 4 testimonials recommended. Add more rows if needed.*

| Name | Class & Board | Year | Testimonial / Review |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Dhruvika  | 6th | 2023 | Parent Testimonial "Aarambh Institute ke teachers bahut dedicated hain. Mere bachche ke marks aur confidence dono mein kaafi improvement hua hai. Hum institute ki teaching aur guidance se bahut santusht hain. |
| Yashika | 7th | 2024 | Aarambh Institute mein padhai ka environment bahut positive hai. Teachers har topic ko simple aur interesting tareeke se samjhate hain, jis se padhai aasan lagti hai." |
| Vaishnavi patel | 10th | 2025 | "Regular tests, personal attention aur progress updates ki wajah se humein bachche ki performance ka poora pata rehta hai. Aarambh Institute sach mein students ke future ko lekar serious hai." |
| Rishabh Bhargav | 11th | 2025 | "Yahan mujhe padhai ke saath motivation bhi milta hai. Teachers hamesha support karte hain aur doubts ko turant solve karte hain."  |
| Gourav Sarothiya | 10th | 2024 | "Best guidance for academic success\!" |

  **SECTION 9 â€” Admission Process**  

| Step 1 \* | Call or WhatsApp us for enquiry |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Step 2 \*** | Visit the institute for a free demo class |
| **Step 3 \*** | Fill the admission form and submit documents |
| **Step 4 \*** | Pay the fees and get your batch timing |
| **Documents Required \*** | Previous year marksheet, Aadhar Card, 2 photos |
| **Admission Season \*** | April to June  |
| **Admission Helpline \*** | 8839714081,7909714081 |
| **Online Admission? \*** | Yes |
